category_sources: source_facts.description says ical-buddy gets events and tasks from the macOS calendar database; official site describes a command-line utility for OS X calendar events and tasks.
display_name_sources: Official homepage at https://hasseg.org/icalBuddy/ uses the product name icalBuddy.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes documentation links, usage examples, FAQs, and manual pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dkaluta/icalBuddy64, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify macOS calendar events/tasks command-line functionality.
